title: oxypolis ternata
intro: Oxypolis ternata, also known as Water Dropwort, is a perennial plant native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an anti-inflammatory agent, antiseptic, and astringent. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Oxypilis ternata is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
